creator: ronald@FreeBSD.org
text:
Port currently builds fine on official package builders on all supported architectures.
https://www.freshports.org/java/openjdk19/#packages

No recent entries in ports fallout.
https://portsfallout.com/fallout?port=java%2Fopenjdk19%24

This version of openjdk has been superseded by an LTS release in openjdk21.

So closing this issue. If new information pops up feel free to re-open it.
